criterion: Bounded-variance compliance for the proposed model remains at or above the bounded-regime target.
Stress drift reduces compliance relative to the bounded regime.
Relative forgetting improvement over GELU is at least ten percent in the bounded regime.
Static baselines exhibit positive regret slope under high conflict.
The stateful activation lowers regret slope by at least thirty percent versus the best static baseline.
Reducing conflict weakens the static-boundary slope relative to the high-conflict regime.
